component.name: Honey, I Shrunk The Vids
component.summary: Batch video encoder with smart bitrate decisions

description.p: A cross-platform batch video encoder that shrinks your video files to a target quality level. Pick a target bitrate, add your files, and hit start. The app figures out what to do with each file automatically.

Supports GPU-accelerated encoding (AMF, NVENC, QSV, VAAPI, VideoToolbox), HDR preservation and tonemapping, Dolby Vision and HDR10+ passthrough, animated WebP/GIF/APNG conversion, AV1 encoding, precision mode with CRF quality targeting, and 25+ input formats.
Code quality overhaul: 15 fixes across security, efficiency, and maintainability.
Feature-gate Dolby Vision and HDR10+ imports; add ffmpeg stderr logging.
AV1 encoding support, per-file codec resolution, code quality pass.
Initial Flatpak support with zero-permission sandbox via XDG portals.
Animated WebP support, theme overhaul, accessibility pass, expanded format support.
